title: Wonders Shards
description: The resource pack used in the Wonders Island Server !, This pack contains all of the custom items textures (Shards) that were used in The Server !
body:
# 🌟 About Wonders Island 

![Wonders Island Severs Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d7a8abff37514bc3fbf97ada6d22c05ff3e7ae.png)


We’re a group of creators who love making Minecraft SMP content!
From time to time, we launch new SMP servers — each with a unique twist.
This season, we’ve introduced custom items with powerful abilities that set them apart from the rest.

✨ We call these special items Shards, inspired by their unique look and magical properties. 

💎 Want to see them in action?
Check out our Wonders SMP playlist, featuring videos from all our members!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/videoseries?si=e8PLKsIvlme6avJZ&list=PLekNs40oKb9jHR4dcyEs1xPSoMHVn6CKL" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Shards Abilities :
**All Shards Textures And abilities Are Listed [Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wonders-shards-!/gallery)**

**All Textures Inspired by Bliss SMP.**
